title: Moon-Research persistent pipeline state (v1)
description: Single-file snapshot of the most recent audit-loop round, written to knowledge-base/_state.json after every round. Consumed by scripts/mr_resume.py to print a recovery plan and by /mr resume to decide whether to advance, revise, or escalate. Updated in-place — there is exactly one _state.json per project. For per-round history, see knowledge-base/audit-rounds/*.json.

project_root.description: Workspace root (or manuscript path) the pipeline is operating on.

current_phase.description: Last phase the audit-loop wrote a verdict for. COMPLETE means the pipeline finished all gates.

last_audit_round_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the most recent per-round audit JSON (under knowledge-base/audit-rounds/).

last_audit_round.description: Round index for last_audit_round_path. 0 means no rounds yet.

last_aggregate.description: Weighted aggregate score from the last round (0-100).

last_decision.description: Decision from the last round. VETO is reserved for critical-axis-only failures; the audit-loop normally emits PASS/REVISE/ESCALATED.

blocking_findings_unresolved.description: Blocking findings carried over from the last round (mirrors audit.blocking_findings).

vetoes_unresolved.description: Active critical-axis vetoes from the last round (mirrors audit.vetoes_global).

runStartedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the pipeline run was launched. Injected by the workflow caller; workflow scripts can't call new Date() on this harness.

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of this state-file write. Workflow scripts mirror runStartedAt here; resume scripts may overwrite with the real wall clock.

estimated_cost_usd_to_date.description: Running total of audit.meta.estimated_cost_usd across rounds. Workflow caller maintains this; audit-loop.js writes 0 and lets the caller patch it before the next round.
